add_bot_title: Associate the smart virtual assistant with your shop
bot_text: Our AI-powered virtual assistant aims to respond to your customers on WhatsApp 24/7, close sales, capture orders, and notify you. Follow the steps below to associate it with your shop.
bot_step1: Click on the right panel to display the QR code.
bot_step2: Open WhatsApp where your customers write to you on your phone.
bot_step3: Tap Menu on Android, or Settings on iPhone.
bot_step5: Point your phone at this screen to scan the QR code.
click_to_show: Click to show the QR code
scan_success: Bingo! Your shop now has a smart virtual assistant that will respond to your customers' messages! Please customize it to your needs by modifying the configurations below.
delete_text: Warning, this action is irreversible. By deleting your shop, you will lose all related data.
image_format: Allowed formats: PNG or JPEG. Maximum size: 800 KB.
name: Name
waiting_time: Waiting time before responding to the customer (in seconds)
no_contact: Only to people not in my contacts
delete_bot_title: Delete the assistant from the shop
delete_bot_text: By deleting it, it will no longer be able to respond to your customers' messages. You can re-link it at any time.
error_create_invoice: Error creating invoice. Please try again.
edit_invoice_text: Customize your template by adding thank you notes and remarks.
error_on_invoice_field_unfilled: Please ensure all required fields are filled!
delivery_configs_text: Set your delivery cities and exclude neighborhoods if applicable.
delivery_company_text: Eliminate stress by entrusting your deliveries to a specialized company. Browse our list of partners and add the required delivery services to your shop.
undelivery_zones_text: Leave this section blank if you deliver to all corners of the selected cities.
services_text: Add services that match your shop by clicking the add button
first_or_lastname: Customer's name, phone number, or email
ad_text: This section allows you to add a Facebook Pixel and an access token. With each order, Facebook will be notified that sales are made via WhatsApp, which will optimize its algorithm for better targeting and help you increase your sales.
